summary: Iteration 34: Verified lecturer collision availability fix. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). When program has collision_resources=['lecturer'] and no assigned_lecturer_id, the system correctly checks ALL scheduled team lecturers. Afternoon blocks (13:00-15:00) outside Demo Admin's 8:00-12:00 availability are marked 'unavailable'. Morning blocks (08:30-12:00) within availability window are marked 'available'. Monthly calendar correctly shows weekdays as available (morning block covered) and weekends as unavailable.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: get_program_availability (availability.py:29-106) correctly checks lecturer availability when has_lecturer_collision=True
VERIFIED: When assigned_lecturer_id is NULL, check_any_lecturer_available_for_block is called to check ALL scheduled team lecturers
VERIFIED: Afternoon block (13:00-15:00) returns 'unavailable' because Demo Admin only has 8:00-12:00 availability
VERIFIED: Morning block (08:30-12:00) returns 'available' because it fits within Demo Admin's 8:00-12:00 window
VERIFIED: get_calendar_availability (availability.py:108-277) also checks lecturer availability for monthly view
VERIFIED: Only lecturers WITH defined availability schedules are considered (scheduled_lecturer_ids filter)
VERIFIED: Weekend dates return empty time_blocks (not in available_days)
VERIFIED: Login flow works with httpOnly cookies
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing program 'Čteme obrazy' with lecturer collision enabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lecturer collision availability fix verified. Program 'Čteme obrazy' (128d6178-e199-4cc5-b247-0e42fe1955d7) has collision_resources=['lecturer'] and assigned_lecturer_id=NULL. Demo Admin (2868bc35-7d6e-4046-87fa-013ee5efdb60) has Mon-Fri 8:00-12:00 recurring availability. The fix ensures afternoon blocks outside lecturer availability are marked 'unavailable' in both daily and monthly views.

CRITICAL: Monthly calendar checks lecturer availability
